node.statement: N7 (FORWARD negative mass; closes FORWARD). The negative mass of P is delta:=max_i sum_j max(-P_ij,0) (def-stochastic). Since Q>=0 entrywise (GT-hyp / def-stochastic), for each (i,j): max(-P_ij,0)=max(Q_ij-P_ij-Q_ij,0)<=max(Q_ij-P_ij,0)<=|Q_ij-P_ij|=|P_ij-Q_ij| (using Q_ij>=0 so -P_ij<=Q_ij-P_ij, and max(t,0)<=|t|). Summing over j: sum_j max(-P_ij,0) <= sum_j |P_ij-Q_ij| = ||p_i-q_i||_1 (row i of P-Q). By N1 (||P-Q||=max_i ||p_i-q_i||_1): delta=max_i sum_j max(-P_ij,0) <= max_i ||p_i-q_i||_1 = ||P-Q|| <= C eta (N6, same universal C). CONCLUSION (FORWARD): from row-stochastic Q with ||Q^2-Q||<=eta, P=theta(2Q-1) is a signed affine retraction (P1=1, P^2=P exactly, N5) with ||P-Q||<=C eta (N6) and negative mass delta<=C eta. [N1; N6; def-stochastic]
